name: @comet/skills
description: Reusable AI coding agent skills for Comet projects

scripts.prepack: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const root=process.cwd();const out=path.join(root,'skills');fs.rmSync(out,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync(out,{recursive:true});for(const dir of ['comet-block','comet-mail-react','comet-minor-update','dev-pm']){fs.cpSync(path.join(root,dir),path.join(out,dir),{recursive:true});}"
